name: HIROKE
tagline: Half in the light, half in the abyss.
bio: A hybrid entity torn between two worlds — one half demon, born of static and shadow; one half machine, raised on syntax and light. By night, Hiroke streams from the Rift. By day, she ships code from the mortal plane.
announcement: Next stream: the Rift opens Friday 20:00 WIB — full schedule below.
